name: Governor Tarva - First Contact
description:
We're not alone in the universe, hooray! There's adorable aliens all over the place, hooray! Wait, whaddya mean they're all scared of us? Well, at least they're not trying to kill us...

Bot 2 of my little birthday trio. Just good ol' Governor Tarva.

I had quite a bit of fun making this one. For once, I don't absolutely hate reading the intro message. And believe it or not, I'm actually kinda proud of that. It's basically a rewrite of the start of chapter 2. Sure, I coulda just copied and pasted it straight from the book, but where's the fun in that?

This bot was requested by Adrian shepherd. I figured I'd work on it since I already had some material for Tarva made from the April Fool's bot.

Here's another space marine. A Void Trident this time. He's a bit flatter, color-wise, but I still like him.

Front

Back

Quick question for anyone who's messed with a few of my bots. What's a good length for the intro message? I'm thinking somewhere between 700 and 900 tokens, but I wanna hear some feedback.

Artist for Tarva here is pampanope on reddit

In case anyone's wound up here who doesn't know what The Nature of Predators is, here's the link. The book is completely free, so go have a read if you haven't already.

Anyway, bot number 2 is done. All that's left is Tynahsa. Her definition is built about as well as it's gonna be. All I need to do is one last rewrite of her intro message, and she'll be all ready for tomorrow.

See you tomorrow. Have a great day, everybody.
creator: SadWyvern1
